race.comment: LIEN HYPHEN (4) has been racing in much stronger company than this and looks well placed coming back to this level. She's placed at the 1900m journey previously and Tsang's claim is a help. Likely to get back in the run but her best form can see her storm over the top of her rivals. MAGIC MIKEY (1) was too good at this track and trip last start when winning in a photo finish. His form at this track and trip is a big tick and Whiting sticks with him. Wouldn't surprise to see him repeat the dose. TOSEN IMPACT (3) resumed from a short beak with a bang, scoring in a photo finish over 1500m here last time out. He steps back out to this trip now which is the query, though things do look to shape favourably for him. Can't be left out of calculations. BELLA VIOLETTA (9) gets the blinkers on first time today and can put her best foot forward. GRANDAD'S ADICTION (6) will take catching if he can find the front once again from the sticky gate.
